title: Kadhal Kappal Lyrics Iraivi
stanzas:
kanna katti moracha
otha vatti siricha podhum
socha jalam inikkum
pacha vaalai thulukkum neram

onnala thaane mazhai
megam peiyum
illama pona enna seiya
sollama pogum unnoda mounam
sillaga pethu enna kolla

ena kannu neruppa povum
ada nee enna verutha paavam
en vaazhka mulukka
nee vandha minukkum
kadhal kappal eari ini povoma

kaalam kaalam maarum
kaadhal saayam oorum
kaalam kaalam maarum
kaadhal sayam oorum

mothamaga enakku
onna thaane pidikkum mogam
unna thedi thudikka
ratha naadi vedichi thaavum

mallukku venam
manasingu sera
mannichi pona thappilla
pallathu thookum
varam onnu keten
nee thaane rani nenjukulla

ena kannu neruppa povum
ada nee enna verutha paavam
en vaazhka mulukka
nee vandha minukkum
kadhal kappal eari ini povoma

kothu kotha azhaga
pothi vacha vazhiyum
angathane radhiya nee iruppa

nitham onnil kalandhu
nithiraiyil marandhu
anbu konda nadhiyil
naan medhappen

onnala thaane mazhai
megam peiyum
illama pona enna seiya
pallathu thookum
varam onnu keten
nee thaane rani nenjukulla

ena kannu neruppa povum
ada nee enna verutha paavam
en vaazhka mulukka
nee vandha minukkum
kadhal kappal eari ini povoma

kaalam kaalam maarum
kaadhal saayam oorum
kaalam kaalam maarum
kaadhal sayam oorum

seo.title: Kadhal Kappal Lyrics Iraivi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Kappal?

The song explores themes of love, longing, and unspoken emotions.

Who is the singer and music director of Kadhal Kappal?

Santhosh Narayanan is both the singer and music director of the song.

What is the context of the song in the movie Iraivi?

The song reflects the emotional turmoil and complex relationships depicted in the film.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kadhal Kappal?

The lyrics were penned by Muthamil.

When was Kadhal Kappal released?

The song was released in 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Iraivi, Kadhal Kappal serves as a poignant reflection of the characters' inner emotional struggles. The song beautifully conveys the themes of love and longing, capturing the essence of unspoken feelings. Santhosh Narayanan's soulful voice and composition evoke a sense of melancholy and romance. The lyrics by Muthamil add depth to the song, making it a memorable piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful journey of love and longing with Kadhal Kappal from the movie Iraivi. Santhosh Narayanan's mesmerizing composition paired with his own vocals creates a hauntingly beautiful melody. Dive into the emotional depths of this song that captures the essence of unspoken love.
stanzaMeanings: When you close your eyes and smile once, the sadness turns sweet, and the green banana swings.
Only because of you, the rain clouds pour. If you leave, what can I do? Your silence is like a chill that freezes me.
Why do your eyes burn? Did I do something wrong? My life shines because of you. Shall we board the love ship and go?
Time keeps changing, and love spreads its color.
I only like you completely. My heart beats searching for you, and my blood rushes.
To wrestle, hearts need to unite. Forgiving past mistakes isn't wrong. I asked for one blessing, for you to be the queen of my heart.
Why do your eyes burn? Did I do something wrong? My life shines because of you. Shall we board the love ship and go?
With your beautiful looks, you stay radiant like a goddess.
Every day, we blend together and forget in sleep. I float in the river of love.
Only because of you, the rain clouds pour. If you leave, what can I do? I asked for one blessing, for you to be the queen of my heart.
Why do your eyes burn? Did I do something wrong? My life shines because of you. Shall we board the love ship and go?
Time keeps changing, and love spreads its color.
